comment: Thresholds pre-committed from VE-003-hold-underwriting-demand.md BEFORE the run. Fill 'observed' after field work, then: python3 opportunity-intelligence/tools/run.py verdict knowledge-base/validation/VE-003-result.json

metrics.name: waitlist_completion_pct
metrics.description: % of qualified hold-affected merchants completing the waitlist with pricing stated

metrics.name: switching_trigger_interviews
metrics.description: of 12 interviews: hold described as switching trigger unprompted

metrics.name: own_policy_would_hold_interviews
metrics.description: of 12 interviews: merchant in a category our own risk policy would also hold (kill signal)

on_pass: Design concierge advance-against-receivables pilot + start regulatory review of settlement guarantees; re-score OPP-010 with interview evidence
on_fail: Reclassify OPP-010 as Weak (niche wedge) in BACKLOG.md; hand verbatims to Workstream A
on_inconclusive: Between thresholds: extend waitlist offers by 20 before deciding; do not soften pricing disclosure
